query:
SELECT id, quoteNumber, clientName, seller1Id, seller1Name, createdAt 
FROM quotes 
WHERE quoteNumber NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}$'
ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4QE1i3LPsxu4CUm.root --database emCAipNpTbMAUBXoZXdNuB --execute SELECT id, quoteNumber, clientName, seller1Id, seller1Name, createdAt 
FROM quotes 
WHERE quoteNumber NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}$'
ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
